services.name: Deluxe Haircut & Styling
services.description: Signature haircut, shampoo wash, scalp massage, and custom blow-dry blow styling.

services.name: Premium Beard Grooming
services.description: Hot towel prep, detailed straight-razor lineup, trimming, and organic beard oil treatment.

services.name: The Royal Service (Combo)
services.description: Deluxe haircut combined with Premium Beard Grooming and a refreshing charcoal peeling mask.

services.name: Classic Face Massage & Facial
services.description: Rejuvenating mud mask, steaming hot towels, facial massage, and hydrating sunscreen application.

emailTemplates.name: Standard Booking Confirmation
emailTemplates.subject: Reservation Confirmed: {service_name} with {business_name}

emailTemplates.name: Day-Before Appointment Reminder
emailTemplates.subject: Reminder: Your upcoming reservation at {business_name} tomorrow

emailTemplates.name: Appointment Cancellation Alert
emailTemplates.subject: Cancellation Notice: {service_name} reschedule options
emailTemplates.body:
Hello {customer_name},

Your scheduled appointment on {appointment_date} at {appointment_time} for "{service_name}" has been successfully cancelled.

If this was done in error or you would like to book a different slot, please reply to this alert or schedule on our web portal.

Sincerely,
{business_name}
